visual_description: A medium shot shows two figures, a man and a woman, walking through a dimly lit, stone corridor. The man, on the left, is holding a large, old-looking map. The woman, on the right, walks beside him, looking up with a concerned expression. The corridor is dark, with a single, high window casting a greenish light on the stone pillars and floor. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio opens with a young man speaking in a frustrated and exasperated tone, his voice filled with annoyance as he exclaims, "Damn it! We'll never find it on this." The camera angle shifts slightly as the two continue to walk. The man, now more visible, looks down at the map with a frustrated expression. The woman looks at him, her expression one of worry. The lighting remains low, with the greenish glow from the window illuminating the scene. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The camera zooms in for a close-up on the map. A hand points to a specific location on the parchment. The map is filled with handwritten text and illustrations. The text "HARRY POTTER" is visible at the top
